original_title: GVH-123 Breaking In At A Celebrity Girls' School - Kaho Imai
overview: "Kaho" attends a prestigious girls' school where many young ladies are enrolled. It was always fashionable, and the gal-style make-up was decided perfectly. However, due to "Kaho", the school rules are strictly checked, and not only classmates but also female teachers are targeted for bullying. Starting with funny face shooting, he has a slap and no underwear bucket. Graffiti on the whole body, being restrained and spit on, friends rubbing and stepping on the tits and ass ... I kept silently receiving sexual bullying that was escalating steadily. A change appears in the appearance of such "Kaho" ...
